{
  "executive_summary": "A food delivery platform architecture built around five bounded contexts — Order Lifecycle, Restaurant, Customer, Delivery Logistics, and Payments — connected via domain events through a message broker. The design prioritizes independent deployability of each context, an event-driven order state machine as the central coordination mechanism, and CQRS in the customer-facing read path for low-latency menu browsing.
